message.body: we can pretend its a subathon in spirit now
how did u like the awards? im so tired LMAO
that call rly did go on for so long, it always does
awards were so boring i slept through them (definitely not because i had been up 18 hours)
my sleep schedule always aligns in the perfect way to miss like every fangame event its crazy. ms vod watcher over here
i always miss every late night streamer too, i get it galaxii
even though the awards started at 6pm my time, the vc post-show went on till like 2am and im usually in bed by 10pm
so awards always fucks me up
yeah natsu sounded out of it already lmao, but he was in another vc with a bunch of ppl watching
big vc's also tire anyone out quite a bit, even with how fun it was
Dang, 9 hrs in san, my streamer is so washed riecheExplode
i'm whatever you want me to be, @apoorautisticsoul
Did you managed to download trap of heaven?
i think it'll be a bit until he gets to play that anyway lol
i too had a double take at game awards from the PSG song in the credits
wait the trap of heaven download link doesn't work for u, nal?
i managed to download it just now, it asks to verify your network and then u can click a button, maybe ur pc is acting up again with a win7 moment lol
i can send it to u if u want
what a good time that was though
I always watch these shows (FGA and FM) a bit disconnected as I don't play or stream much now, but by the time they end, I always feel sad and miss everyone again :(
always so well produced and full of heart
it means a lot to hear it from u wolfie
cheers mate, as you would say
the return to 2.5 is upon us
yeah... I feel weirdly estranged now, it's a little sad
maybe I'll try to stream one of the new releases sometime
or checking out the games that were nominated for FOTY
no I never did finish 2.5, I put a lot of time into it but
its time to start another 200 game challenge featuring only releases from the last 2 years @Wolfiexe
I still watch people at least, i.e. you and Echo for example
I'm more a lurker now than I used to be though
surely that will get you going...
but what :o if its the puzzles getting too complicated there is a website with hints. they dont give away the solutions immediately
we can easily find 96 games for you wolfi
ah, the secret finding in 2.5 is a lot of fun! it can be frustrating being mega stuck but I mostly didn't mind, I think it's mostly just the difficulty
I don't have the motivation to grind or go through really hard things, at least not like I used to
and I know some of the stages in CN2.5 and later content would be really rough for me
i bet kale still thinks that screen could be longer
that's the hardest part of the game by a mile
@Kalemandu Let the maker fear not he who hath put out into the world, for he is the bearer of thy own creation
there's a clip of him finding that one

hmm I think if you view the game as fun you should try it out again. and even if you get stuck on something for a bit you got the coolest people to talk to in chat. if something gets tedious you could have an easier backup game to switch to
it has a lot of views so it just shows up high on his Clips -> view by all time views
@Echo_Mask yeah, I think if I'm in the right mood then I wouldn't mind the difficulty so maybe
how much do you know about the game?
okay well I found and cleared 19 secret stages
@Wolfiexe Thee drowneth' not in the pits of thy labor but in the spires of the arrogance they are etched upon
yea.. I don't wanna argue about it though
mm you do a little bit... I get it..

he can finally play gacha games, wolfie
ESA feels like a lifetime ago
also I did the secrets now and got to ex big kid
and there's an interesting detail about it
the two blocks that lead to the next room aren't solid, so the bouncing fruit can leave through there and not be a problem for a while
it was fine in normal big kid
hi Nal, good luck on day 2
and you might think you can just walk past him but they also screwed up his hitbox so it's the full sprite now
it was like that in normal big kid as well
somehow two wrongs made a right
it's like actually so exciting to discover something like this
didn't think you had it in you to pull that off twice within 12 hours
it's not the first Vanvan trailer with a date
but I enjoyed the trailer, as always
ok but would floogle have danced that hard if vanvan wasn't coming out in 2026
I don't know well enough to say, Floogle doesn't strike me as a Vandal appreciator :(
maybe they thought it would be too hard on mobile so they decided to nerf it slightly
so maybe it being turned into something new, is exactly why he'd be so excited
you know, big kid is fine but ex big kid is where we draw the line
I was going back through old Vanvan trailers a couple days back
and there was one like 3-4 years ago that showed off actual genuine high-octane gameplay
I don't think they've showcased any gameplay since in the 4 yearly trailers that followed
